text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried about the Japanese Derby,
Matikanefukukitaru pays a visit to a shrine to ask
a favor of the gods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She happens to see Silence Suzuka, another
entrant in the Japanese Derby, while she's there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka says she has come to pray that she
isn't overwhelmed by the monster of a race that is
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru realizes that, despite her
amazing talents, Suzuka views her as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her concerns put at ease,
Matikanefukukitaru offers up her own prayers
alongside Silence Suzuka.
